general_crisis_line.name: General Support & Listening Warmline
general_crisis_line.description: Professional, confidential warmline for supportive listening, stress, loneliness, and life challenges. Non-emergency assistance.

accredited_buddies.name: Alex M.
accredited_buddies.quote: "In medicine, as in life, the most important thing you can give anyone is hope." — Doogie Howser, M.D.
accredited_buddies.approach: I tend to listen quietly and ask gentle clarifying questions. I won't jump to giving advice unless you specifically ask for it. I view our time as a shared safe container where your feelings are valid just as they are.
accredited_buddies.bio: Empathetic listener specializing in anxiety management and LGBTQ+ community support. Safe, judgment-free space.

accredited_buddies.name: Sarah J.
accredited_buddies.quote: "Every challenge we face is an opportunity to learn, to grow, and to become a better version of ourselves." — Doogie Howser, M.D.
accredited_buddies.approach: I specialize in crisis de-escalation and trauma-informed peer listening. My goal is to help you feel grounded, heard, and supported without rushing your healing process.
accredited_buddies.bio: Certified in active listening. Here to provide a supportive ear for crisis de-escalation, trauma recovery, and daily stress.

accredited_buddies.name: Marcus T.
accredited_buddies.quote: "True strength is not about never failing, but about having the courage to stand up and try again." — Doogie Howser, M.D.
accredited_buddies.approach: As a veteran support specialist, I bring a calm, tactical, and empathetic approach to overcoming stress and PTSD triggers. You are never alone in the fight.
accredited_buddies.bio: Vetted peer buddy and veteran support specialist focusing on mindfulness, stress reduction, and PTSD coping strategies.

accredited_buddies.name: Elena R.
accredited_buddies.quote: "You do not have to walk on your knees for a hundred miles repenting. You only have to let the soft animal of your body love what it loves."
accredited_buddies.approach: I provide a warm, patient presence for navigating grief, depression, and family stressors. Together, we move at your own pace without judgment.
accredited_buddies.bio: Certified support buddy with compassionate experience navigating depression, anxiety, grief, and family dynamic stressors.

accredited_buddies.name: David K.
accredited_buddies.quote: "In medicine, as in life, the most important thing you can give anyone is hope." — Doogie Howser, M.D.
accredited_buddies.approach: Lived experience in addiction recovery and crisis listening. I believe in honest, non-judgmental peer connections where every step forward is celebrated.
grounding_exercises: One day at a time mindfulness
accredited_buddies.bio: Dedicated peer recovery specialist with lived experience in addiction recovery and crisis listening. Here when you're ready.
